_comment: Retell custom-function definitions. Replace {{BASE_URL}} with the deployed backend URL (e.g. https://apollo-voice.up.railway.app). Each tool POSTs {name, args, call} to its url and reads the JSON `message` back to the caller. Conflict responses include an `alternatives` array.

tools.name: find_doctor
tools.description: Find doctors by department, specialty, or symptom. Resolves vague terms like 'bone doctor' or 'knee pain' to the right department. Use this first when the caller names a problem or specialty.

department.description: Department, specialty, or symptom in the caller's words (e.g. 'Orthopedics', 'bone', 'knee', 'skin rash').

name.description: Partial doctor name, if the caller asked for someone specific.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Get open appointment slots for a doctor, optionally on a specific date. Returns the soonest open slots; use the returned slot_id to book.

date.description: Optional day to check, formatted YYYY-MM-DD in clinic local time.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book an appointment into a specific open slot. Only call after confirming doctor, date, and time with the caller. If the slot was just taken, the response includes alternative times to offer.

patient_phone.description: Patient phone number. Defaults to the caller's number if omitted.

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Move an existing appointment to a new open slot with the same doctor. Look up the appointment first to get its id.

tools.name: cancel_appointment
tools.description: Cancel an existing appointment. Look it up and confirm with the caller before cancelling.

tools.name: lookup_appointments
tools.description: Look up the caller's existing appointments by phone number. Defaults to the caller's own number. Use before rescheduling or cancelling.

phone.description: Phone number to look up. Defaults to the caller's number if omitted.
